testcase.name: bake-logic > runBake – file system errors > throws and logs an error when the data directory does not exist
bake-logic > runBake – happy path > logs how many YAML files were found
testcase.system-out:
[34m[mapper][39m [bake-logic] Found 1 YAML files in /data
[34m[mapper][39m [32m[bake-logic] Resolved output path: /out/data.json[39m [34m[mapper][39m [32m[bake-logic] Data baked to /out/data.json[39m

testcase.name: bake-logic > runBake – happy path > constructs GroupService, ServicesService, TeamsService and ConnectionsService

[34m[mapper][39m [bake-logic] Found 0 YAML files in /data
[34m[mapper][39m [32m[bake-logic] Resolved output path: /out/data.json[39m [34m[mapper][39m [32m[bake-logic] Data baked to /out/data.json[39m

[34m[mapper][39m [bake-logic] Found 0 YAML files in /data

testcase.name: bake-logic > runBake – happy path > logs error and rethrows when writeFileSync throws
testcase.system-out:
[34m[mapper][39m [bake-logic] Found 0 YAML files in /data
[34m[mapper][39m [32m[bake-logic] Resolved output path: /out/data.json[39m
testcase.system-err: [34m[mapper][39m [31m[bake-logic] Failed to write data.json: Error: disk full[39m

testcase.name: bake-logic > runBake – happy path > uses default dataDir from process.cwd() when no opts are provided
download-aws-icons > should skip update if icons are up to date
download-aws-icons > should update if icons are old
download-aws-icons > should handle successful download and extraction with flattening
download-aws-icons > should handle fetch failure
download-aws-icons > handles fetch rejection: AbortError (timeout)
download-aws-icons > handles fetch rejection: generic Error
download-aws-icons > handles fetch rejection: unknown throw value
download-aws-icons > should handle empty ZIP extraction
download-aws-icons > should handle more than one item in ZIP extraction (no flattening)
ConnectionsService > returns outgoing connections for a service
ConnectionsService > returns incoming connections for a service
ConnectionsService > returns outgoing connections for a group
ConnectionsService > returns incoming connections for a group
ConnectionsService > filters self-loop connections by default but can include them
ConnectionsService > aggregates group connections with accurate counts
ResourceService > parses group metadata from YAML files
ResourceService > returns all discovered groups keyed by folder name
ResourceService > returns null when a group folder is missing
ResourceService > ignores non-group files when rebuilding index
ResourceService > returns null for invalid/empty group YAML (parseEntity returns null)
ResourceService > parseEntity returns null and logs error for invalid YAML
testcase.system-err:
[34m[mapper][39m [31mFailed to parse group info for api:[39m YAMLException: bad indentation of a mapping entry (1:14)
1 | invalid: yaml: : : ------------------^ at generateError [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:1289:10[90m)[39m at throwError [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:1293:9[90m)[39m at readBlockMapping [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:2278:7[90m)[39m at composeNode [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:2537:12[90m)[39m at readDocument [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:2721:3[90m)[39m at loadDocuments [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:2784:5[90m)[39m at Object.load$1 [as load] [90m(file:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4mjs-yaml[24m/dist/js-yaml.mjs:2810:19[90m)[39m at GroupService.parseEntity [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/GroupService.ts:23:27[90m)[39m at [90m/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/GroupService.test.ts:83:41 at [90mfile:///home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mnode_modules/[4m@vitest[24m/runner/dist/index.js:145:11 { reason: [32m'bad indentation of a mapping entry'[39m, mark: { name: [1mnull[22m, buffer: [32m'invalid: yaml: : :\n'[39m, position: [33m13[39m, line: [33m0[39m, column: [33m13[39m, snippet: [32m' 1 | invalid: yaml: : :\n------------------^'[39m } }

testcase.name: ServicesService > loads a single service definition by group and identifier
ServicesService > returns all services for a group
ServicesService > returns null for unknown services
ServicesService > returns external services grouped by direction
ServicesService > populates incoming connections on target services
ServicesService > returns both incoming and outgoing entries when the same service has bidirectional links to the same external service
ServicesService > rejects legacy brace-based target identifiers
testcase.system-err: [34m[mapper][39m [31m[ServicesService] Failed to parse service api/gateway:[39m Error: Invalid targetIdentifier for gateway connection 0: legacy 'service{group}' format is not supported at parseServiceIdentifier [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/shared/src/validators.ts:19:13[90m)[39m at [90m/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/shared/src/validators.ts:59:7 at Array.forEach (<anonymous>) at validateServiceDefinition [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/shared/src/validators.ts:54:30[90m)[39m at ServicesService.parseEntity [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/ServicesService.ts:49:23[90m)[39m at ServicesService.loadIntoCache [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/YamlEntityService.ts:105:29[90m)[39m at ServicesService.fetchEntity [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/YamlEntityService.ts:25:14[90m)[39m at ServicesService.fetchAllEntities [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/YamlEntityService.ts:39:39[90m)[39m at ServicesService.prepare [90m(/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/ServicesService.ts:61:16[90m)[39m at [90m/home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/[39mpackages/engine/src/services/ServicesService.test.ts:148:34

testcase.name: TeamsService > returns team information for a given team id
TeamsService > builds a map of all teams
TeamsService > returns null for unknown teams
TeamsService > ignores non-team files when rebuilding index
TeamsService > returns null when team yaml is invalid or empty
TeamsService > parseEntity returns null and logs error for invalid YAML
testcase.system-err:
[34m[mapper][39m [31mFailed to parse team info for cloud-shepherds:[39m YAMLException: bad indentation of a mapping entry (1:14)

testcase.name: BaseCommand > registers command with correct name and description
BaseCommand > calls run when command is executed via Commander with correct args
bake-util > getDataDir > returns a path ending with /data
bake-util > getOutputDir > returns a path ending with /.mapper
bake-util > getOutputPath > returns a path containing data.json
bake-util > bakeOrExit > calls runBake with a correct dataDir when data directory exists
bake-util > bakeOrExit > calls runBake with a correct outputPath when data directory exists
bake-util > bakeOrExit > logs an error and calls process.exit(1) when data directory is missing
testcase.system-err: [34m[mapper][39m [31m[mapper-engine] ERROR: Missing ./data directory. Please create a data folder with YAML files.[39m

testcase.name: config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > applies default value for build.outDir when parsing an empty object
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > applies default value for site.title when parsing an empty object
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > applies default value for site.subtitle when parsing an empty object
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > accepts and returns custom build.outDir
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > accepts and returns custom site title and subtitle
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > accepts and returns an optional logo
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > logo is undefined when not provided
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > MapperConfigSchema > throws a ZodError for an invalid outDir type
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > returns defaults when mapper.config.json does not exist
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > does not call readFileSync when the config file does not exist
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > reads and parses mapper.config.json when it exists
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > merges partial config with defaults (site stays default when not provided)
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > returns a full custom config when all fields are provided
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > throws when config file contains invalid JSON
config-mapper (integration – real zod) > getMapperConfig > throws when config file contains wrong field type
ViteLauncher > resolveTemplateRoot (via launch) > resolves @resource-mapper/core package path and passes its dirname as cwd to execa
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > resolveTemplateRoot (via launch) > calls logger.error and process.exit(1) when @resource-mapper/core cannot be resolved
ViteLauncher > findViteBin (via launch) > uses the vite bin resolved via require.resolve when the path exists
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > findViteBin (via launch) > falls back to local node_modules/.bin/vite when resolved vite path does not exist but local bin does
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > findViteBin (via launch) > falls back to plain "vite" string when neither resolved nor local bin exists
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > logs info messages for dev command
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > calls execa with correct options for dev command
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > passes only ["dev"] as args and does not include --outDir when outDir is omitted
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > passes only ["build"] as args and does not include --outDir when outDir is omitted
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: build [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: build

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > calls execa with build + --outDir + --emptyOutDir when outDir is provided
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: build [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: build --outDir /home/runner/work/resource-mapper/resource-mapper/dist --emptyOutDir

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > returns the child process returned by execa
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > merges process.env with provided env when calling execa
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > attaches a catch handler to the child process
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > catch handler with signal SIGINT: logs=killed exit=false
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: ViteLauncher > launch > catch handler with signal SIGTERM: logs=something went wrong exit=true
testcase.system-out: [34m[mapper][39m Launching vite with command: dev [34m[mapper][39m Running vite with args: dev

testcase.name: BuildCommand > logs and runs bake/build logic and calls bakeOrExit, getOutputPath, launcher.launch
BuildCommand > sets up cleanup handlers and calls kill/on
DevCommand > logs and runs bake/dev logic and calls bakeOrExit, getDataDir, getOutputPath, launcher.launch, watcher.on
testcase.system-out:
[34m[mapper][39m Running bake logic...
[34m[mapper][39m [32mBake complete. Launching Vite dev server...[39m

testcase.name: DevCommand > sets up cleanup handlers and calls watcher.close, viteProc.kill, viteProc.on
ValidateCommand > logs validation steps and finds files, calls path.resolve, fs.existsSync, fs.readdirSync

Project is ready to map![39m
